headline: Knicks 🔥🏀 TRUMP 🟠🐘 MSG GAME 3 HYPE 💥🗽
text: Knicks 🏀🔥 STREAKING like Timmy Chalamet 😍🍿 and BEN STILLER 😂🕴️ with MSG MADNESS 🏟️💥! 2-0 lead 🍑👑 first FINALS since '99 😤, Spurs 🤠🐂 about to get COOKED 🥵🍳 at home arena! Trump 🍊👑 rolling up with Secret Service 🕵️‍♂️💼, no bags 👜🚫 like airport TSA vibes ✈️😩! Empire State 🗼🧡 & One WTC 🏙️💙 glowing Knicks orange-blue, city ELECTRIC ⚡🗽! Spike Lee 🎥👓, Kylie Jenner 💄🛍️ courtside flexing, Mayor Zohran 😎🥑 in different section from Prez! Cheap tickets? $10K resale 😭💸, Trump says 'watch on TV semi-free' 📺🤑! Streets packed 🏃‍♂️🍔, lamppost climbers 🚔👮, watch parties cancelled cuz Secret Service 🤫🚫! NYPD thousands 👮‍♂️🛡️, stabbing at Penn Station 😱🔪 but Knicks still SLAYING 🗡️🏆! Need 2 more WINS 🏆🍾 since '73 drought BROKEN 💦🧊! Bagels 🥯🟠 ice cream 🍦💙, subway station KNICKSIFIED 🚇🏀! NYC going CRAZY 🍕🗽 for first title since 1973 🔥😩!
